sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this Sega Genesis title

special_mechanics.name: Character-Specific Jump Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Cyclops can perform C+C (spin jump), C+C rapidly for super high jump, and C+C+A for optic blast spin attack. Multiple jump techniques available per character.

physics_values.mid_air_attacks: available for Wolverine with claw enhancements

special_mechanics.name: Teleportation
special_mechanics.description: Nightcrawler can teleport to skip areas and transport secondary characters mid-level.

special_mechanics.name: Mid-Air Special Attacks
special_mechanics.description: Wolverine can execute special mid-air attacks enhanced by his retractable claws.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics description but no quantitative physics parameters (speeds, acceleration, gravity values). Game noted for 'ridiculously annoying jumps' and 'unfairly placed enemies' suggesting specific but undocumented jump physics tuning. No ROM data or technical specifications available.
